title: Accounting Conferences 2026–2027: The Global Calendar for Finance Teams
excerpt: A curated calendar of the major accounting and finance conferences worldwide — dates, locations and focus — from today through 2027, with links to register.
author: FinBoard

content:
Conferences are where the accounting profession decides what comes next — which tools to adopt, how AI reshapes the close, and how firms and finance teams should structure advisory work. Below is a running calendar of the major accounting and finance conferences happening around the world from today through 2027, with dates, locations, focus and links to register.

Dates and venues are taken from official sources as of July 2026 and are subject to change — always confirm on the event's official site before booking travel. This page is curated by the FinBoard team and updated as new dates are announced.

The 2026–2027 accounting conference calendar

DatesConferenceLocationFocus
July 28–30, 2026Bridging the Gap 2026Charlotte, NC, USAFirm growth, advisory and the human side of accounting
October 26–28, 2026Intuit Connect 2026ARIA Resort & Casino, Las Vegas, NV, USAQuickBooks & Intuit ecosystem, firm growth, AI tooling
November 8–11, 2026AFP 2026Mandalay Bay, Las Vegas, NV, USATreasury, FP&A and payments
November 16–19, 2026Thomson Reuters SYNERGY 2026Fontainebleau, Las Vegas, NV, USATax & accounting technology
November 17–19, 2026World Congress of Accountants (WCOA) 2026Seoul, South KoreaThe global accountancy profession (IFAC & KICPA)
December 6–9, 2026Digital CPA Conference 2026San Diego, CA, USA (+ online)Client Accounting Services (CAS), firm tech & automation
May 12–13, 2027Accountex London 2027ExCeL London, UKEurope's largest accounting & fintech exhibition
June 27–30, 2027Scaling New Heights 2027Orlando, FL, USAPractice growth, technology and advisory

The conferences in detail

Bridging the Gap 2026 — July 28–30, 2026

Where: Charlotte, NC, USA  ·  Format: In-person  ·  Focus: Firm growth, advisory and the human side of accounting

The Unique CPA's signature event pairs technical sessions with a strong focus on culture, leadership and building an advisory-first practice. Official site & registration →

Intuit Connect 2026 — October 26–28, 2026

Where: ARIA Resort & Casino, Las Vegas, NV, USA  ·  Format: In-person  ·  Focus: QuickBooks & Intuit ecosystem, firm growth, AI tooling

Intuit's flagship event for accounting firms — deep dives on QuickBooks, the Intuit Accountant and Enterprise suites, and AI-powered workflows for multi-service firms. Official site & registration →

AFP 2026 — November 8–11, 2026

Where: Mandalay Bay, Las Vegas, NV, USA  ·  Format: In-person  ·  Focus: Treasury, FP&A and payments

The Association for Financial Professionals' annual conference draws 7,000+ treasury, FP&A and payments professionals — the biggest gathering on the corporate-finance side of the house. Official site & registration →

Thomson Reuters SYNERGY 2026 — November 16–19, 2026

Where: Fontainebleau, Las Vegas, NV, USA  ·  Format: In-person  ·  Focus: Tax & accounting technology

Thomson Reuters' user conference for tax and accounting professionals, centred on its product ecosystem, automation and the future of tax workflow. Official site & registration →

World Congress of Accountants (WCOA) 2026 — November 17–19, 2026

Where: Seoul, South Korea  ·  Format: In-person  ·  Focus: The global accountancy profession (IFAC & KICPA)

Held every few years, WCOA is the profession's premier global summit. The 2026 edition — jointly hosted by IFAC and KICPA — moves to a new biennial format. (In-person attendance is invitation-only.) Official site & registration →

Digital CPA Conference 2026 — December 6–9, 2026

Where: San Diego, CA, USA (+ online)  ·  Format: In-person + online  ·  Focus: Client Accounting Services (CAS), firm tech & automation

Organised by CPA.com and the AICPA, Digital CPA is the go-to event for firms building a technology-forward CAS practice, with a live-online option for remote attendees. Official site & registration →

Accountex London 2027 — May 12–13, 2027

Where: ExCeL London, UK  ·  Format: In-person  ·  Focus: Europe's largest accounting & fintech exhibition

Europe's biggest accounting show — 17,000+ attendees, hundreds of exhibitors and dozens of theatres covering practice tech, fintech and the future of the profession. Official site & registration →

Scaling New Heights 2027 — June 27–30, 2027

Where: Orlando, FL, USA  ·  Format: In-person  ·  Focus: Practice growth, technology and advisory

A practitioner-focused conference for firm owners building profitable, scalable, advisory-led practices, with a heavy emphasis on AI and automation. Official site & registration →

Also on the radar (dates to be confirmed)

These recurring events hadn't confirmed their next dates at publication. Check their official pages for updates:

  • AICPA & CIMA ENGAGE 2027 — June 2027 (TBC), Las Vegas, USA
  • Xerocon 2027 — Dates TBC — Xero's partner event
  • Sage Transform 2027 — Spring 2027 (TBC), USA
  • CPA Australia events — Year-round across Australia & Asia-Pacific
  • ICAI national conferences (India) — Year-round across Indian cities

Getting the most out of an accounting conference

  • Pick by outcome, not brand. Going to adopt AI in your close? A product-ecosystem event (Intuit Connect, SYNERGY) beats a general one. Building an advisory practice? Bridging the Gap or Scaling New Heights.
  • Book CPE-eligible sessions early — the high-value workshops fill first.
  • Plan the vendor floor. Shortlist the tools you actually want to evaluate and book demos in advance.
  • Bring one real problem (a messy multi-entity close, a consolidation that won't tie out) and use the hallway track to pressure-test solutions.

Running a multi-entity close and tired of stitching QuickBooks exports together between conferences? FinBoard brings consolidation, close, FP&A and reporting into one governed, AI-native workspace. Book a consultation to see it on your own books.

Last updated: 16 July 2026. Spotted a missing conference or a changed date? Dates are confirmed on each event's official site linked above.
